name: Tom Duffy Company
message: Commercial & Residential ConstructionFounded in 1956, Tom Duffy Company specializes in floor covering and supplies offering flooring installation, Ceramic Tile & Stone Setting, and floor heating systems. Tom Duffy Company is located in CaliforniaHeadquarters400 E Ball Rd, Anaheim, California, 92805, United StatesPhone Number(562) 404-7900
